philippines.title: Spikers' Turf Finals: Criss Cross fends off Savogue in Game 1
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — Jude Garcia scored 26 points as Criss Cross moved closer to a second straight title after taking Game 1 of their best-of-three title series against first-timer Savouge, 25-20, 26-28, 25-18, 25-20, in the Spikers’ Turf Open Conference on Wednesday at Filoil Centre. Four-time league MVP Garcia leaned on his experience, nailing 23 kills and three blocks as the King Crunchers got back at the Spin Doctors, who beat them in five sets in the semifinals to halt their 10-game unbeaten run. Jaron Requinton continued to step up for the King Crunchers with 18 points. Noel Kampton chipped […]...
Keep on reading: Spikers' Turf Finals: Criss Cross fends off Savogue in Game 1

philippines.title: HEAT INDEX WATCH: 2 areas register 'danger' levels Wednesday, April 15
philippines.description:
MANILA, Philippines — Two areas recorded “danger”-level heat indices exceeding 42°C on Wednesday, April 15, the state weather bureau reported. Based on data released by the Philippine Atmospheric, Geophysical, and Astronomical Services Administration (Pagasa) as of 5 p.m. of April 15, CBSUA-Pili, Camarines Sur and Dagupan City, Pangasinan each recorded a peak index of 42ºC. […]...
Keep on reading: HEAT INDEX WATCH: 2 areas register 'danger' levels Wednesday, April 15

philippines.title: Solea Mactan Resort holds media launch for Solea Cordova Run 2026
philippines.description:
On April 10, 2026, Solea Mactan Resort brought together running enthusiasts, local government officials, and members of the media for the official media launch of the Solea Cordova Run 2026. The media event offered an exclusive preview of the event, unveiling key highlights ahead of its kickoff on April 26, 2026. “We are officially sold out with an overwhelming response of 3,100 runners,” said Rysthel Coyoca, Solea Mactan’s duty manager.  10th Anniversary with the community This year, Solea celebrates its 10th anniversary in a different approach. Away from the usual grand celebrations, Solea Mactan chose to mark its anniversary with […]...
Keep on reading: Solea Mactan Resort holds media launch for Solea Cordova Run 2026

energy.title: Trump Says Iran War Is 'Very Close to Over,' Hints at Deal This Week
energy.description: The U.S. may not need to extend the ceasefire with Iran because it may not be necessary, President Donald Trump said, expressing his view that the war is "very close to over" and suggesting that new talks could be held as early as this week. Asked by Fox News' Maria Bartiromo whether or not the war is over, President Trump said in an interview "I think it's close to over. Yeah. I mean I view it as very close to over." "If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country. And we're not finished, but we'll see what…

energy.title: Indonesia Turns to Russia for Oil as Middle East Risks Mount
energy.description: Indonesia and Russia are in talks on boosting cooperation, including through the long-term supply of Russian crude to the Asian nation, media have reported, following a meeting between the presidents of the two countries earlier this week. Reports cited Indonesia’s energy and mineral resources minister as confirming the country will be buying more Russian crude as well as liquefied petroleum gas. The confirmation came after a meeting between Indonesia’s top energy official and his Russian counterpart. Indonesia produces some 600,000…
